expect: Enforcement audit will stay above 15% and may recover missing structural citations or surface one actionable high-Sharpe unwired prescription without overlapping active F119 or quality lanes.
actual: CONFIRMED. tools/enforcement_router.py stayed well above target and the audit recovered L-1354 as a structural prescription after adding the missing citation to tools/dispatch_scoring.py. The recovered wiring is the soul-informed dispatch multiplier that weights domains by human-good ratio, which matches L-1354's rule that benefit_ratio is a dispatch-allocation property rather than a lesson-quality property.
diff: Expected at most one recovered citation and got a clean recovery: L-1354 disappeared from the aspirational list. Structural count moved 145 -> 147, periodic 23 -> 22, aspirational 313 -> 312, and structural enforcement rate improved 30.1% -> 30.6%. No behavior change was required because the mechanism was already live; the gap was provenance, not implementation.
